fields.summary: Creates a new typeface that applies the font arguments specified by <paramref name="args" /> to this typeface.
fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> configured with the given arguments, or <see langword="null" /> if the operation is not supported.

params.args: The font arguments specifying collection index, palette index, palette overrides, and variation design position.

fields.summary: Creates a new typeface that uses the specified font palette index.
fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> configured to use the specified palette, or <see langword="null" /> if the operation is not supported.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the font palette to use.

fields.summary: Creates a new typeface positioned at the specified variation design coordinates.
fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> positioned at the given design coordinates, or <see langword="null" /> if the operation is not supported.

params.position: A read-only span of axis/value coordinates specifying the variation design position.

fields.value: A shared empty typeface that can be used as a safe non-null placeholder.

fields.summary: Fills the specified span with the variation axis parameters supported by this typeface and returns the count written.
fields.returns: The number of variation axis parameters written to <paramref name="axes" />, which is at most the length of the span.

params.axes: The span that receives the variation axis parameters. Pass an empty span to query the count without writing.

fields.summary: Fills the specified span with the current variation design position of this typeface and returns the count written.
fields.returns: The number of coordinates written to <paramref name="coordinates" />, which is at most the length of the span.

params.coordinates: The span that receives the current variation design coordinates. Pass an empty span to query the count without writing.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this typeface is the shared empty typeface.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if this instance is the empty typeface; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets the number of variation axis parameters supported by this typeface.
fields.value: The total number of variation axes defined in the font.

fields.summary: Gets all variation axis parameters supported by this typeface.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> values describing each supported variation axis.

fields.summary: Gets the current variation design position of this typeface.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values describing the axis coordinates that define this typeface instance.

fields.summary: Gets the number of variation design coordinates for this typeface.
fields.value: The total number of axis/value coordinates that define the current variation design position.
